Starting from loading to unloading and maintaining the highest standards in terms of safety while in transit, we take nothing to chance.

ABOUT US

Bin Qutab Logistics LLC is specialized in Supply Chain Management since last 17 years, we provide services in the optimization of the supply /demand chain. The firm is medium‒sized, assuring that client projects will have the full attention of our senior staff, Our principals have completed over 5,000 client engagements, including assignments for some of the largest and best‒known corporations in UAE (all GCC Countries), Pakistan, UK, USA, Canada & Africa. At Bin Qutab Logistics LLC, we’ve been helping leading companies in a range of industries tackle these problems for over 17 years and more than 1200 client engagements. Though every problem we encounter is different, we approach all of our engagements with certain fundamental perspectives:
• We specialize in logistics, supply chain management, warehousing, transportation, and customer service issues. It’s all we do and all we’ve ever done. We don’t use logistics as a way of selling you something else.
• We know our clients want to save money and improve performance in the long run, but they also want to do so now. In many of our engagements, costs savings are realized within one or two quarters ‒ while setting the stage for even more sizable improvements down the line.
• We aren’t beholden to any particular solution or platform; our only concern is what is best for our clients.
• Our work covers the ground from strategy through implementation. We can design a new strategy or analyze a problem, propose solutions and then oversee implementation, according to your needs.
• We like ‒ really like ‒ what we do. There’s nothing more rewarding for us than tackling a difficult client problem, developing the best solution, and making the changes.

READ MORE



Cargo

Specialized and internationally certified in-house hazmat professionals for DGR and IMDG handling. Officially listed on US government’s database as certified for hazmat logistics for Pakistan. Complete adherence to “The United Nations Basel Convention on Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and Their Disposal 1989. …

Read more

TRANSPORT

Bin Qutab offers reliable, flexible and customized trucking solutions. We have access to the equipment and capacity you need, whenever you need it – wherever you need it. Our teams match your freight with the right vehicle and the right route, with flexibility to change resources if/when needed. We offer this as a door-to-door service …

Read more

Air/Sea Freight

Specialized and world renowned in-house team for handling medium to large-scale project. Pre-shipment planning to final execution and delivery hand in hand with client. Complete route surveys with satellite photos. Multiple transport modes and handling options. Proven experience of handling critical assignments for defense, oil & gas, power generation, donor agencies, embassies, FMCG, Exhibitions, industrial clients. …

Read more

Storage

We have flexible options for all kinds of warehousing solutions. Across the country we have various types of warehousing facilities available designed to support a wide range customers. Customized warehousing and distribution services available. Safe and secured spaces for dry, cold or chilled storage. Flexibility of providing strategically located, dedicated storage facilities as per needs of customers. …

Read more

OUR SERVICES

PACKAGING AND STORAGE

We can package and store your things.

WAREHOUSING

We have top notch security and loads of space. Store your stuff at our warehouse.

CARGO

Let us transport your things from point A to point B fast and securely.

DOOR-TO-DOOR DELIVERY

Do you need something delivered? We are what you are looking for!

WORLDWIDE TRANSPORT

We can transport your things anywhere in the world.

GROUND TRANSPORT

Transport your things with our super moving vans.
